--- a/src/mathutil.py
+++ b/src/mathutil.py
@@ -4,6 +4,6 @@
 def sum_to(n):
     """Sum of integers 1..n inclusive."""
     total = 0
-    for i in range(1, n):  # BUG: excludes n; should be range(1, n + 1)
+    for i in range(1, n + 1):  # BUG: excludes n; should be range(1, n + 1)
         total += i
     return total
